versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   dex-0-24-1                      true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: ClusterDeployment
# kind: MultiClusterService
...
serviceSpec:
    services:
      - template: dex-0-24-0
        name: dex
        namespace: dex
        values: |
          dex:
            config:
              issuer: https://dex.tunnelto.dev/dex
              storage:
                type: memory
              connectors:
                - type: mockCallback
                  id: mock
                  name: Example
